  1. Trier /

Hotels in Trier

Curated hotels across the city, from boutique town houses to wellness resorts. Live prices via Booking.com.

★★★★
Guest favourite

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Park Plaza Trier

Comfortable 4-star hotel on the Kornmarkt, three minutes from the Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the cathedral.

⭐ 8.6/10 · 2104 reviews From 119 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Mercure Hotel Trier Porta Nigra

4-star hotel right next to the Porta Nigra. The location lives up to the name.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 1872 reviews From 109 €
★★★★
Guest favourite

Trier-Süd

Hotel Villa Huegel

Boutique hotel in an Art Nouveau villa above the city. Spa, fine-dining level, and great views.

⭐ 9/10 · 1483 reviews From 165 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Best Western Plus Hotel Trier City

Modern 4-star hotel on the edge of the old town. Fresh rooms, breakfast buffet, fitness room.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 1290 reviews From 99 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Domhotel Trier

Family-run 4-star hotel directly on the Hauptmarkt (the main market square). Classic Trier charm.

⭐ 8.7/10 · 980 reviews From 115 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel Roemischer Kaiser

Traditional house right next to the Porta Nigra. Cozy, regional, no frills.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 850 reviews From 110 €
★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel zur Glocke

Small city hotel on Glockenstrasse. Personally run, fair prices, central location.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 720 reviews From 79 €
★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Aurelius am Dom

Modern boutique hotel right behind the cathedral. Clean lines, fair prices, prime location.

⭐ 8.6/10 · 590 reviews From 89 €
★★★

Trier-Nord

Ibis Trier

Reliable brand standard at fair prices next to the main train station. Arrive, check in, head into town.

⭐ 8.2/10 · 2350 reviews From 69 €
★★
Guest favourite

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hostel Hille

Budget address with dorms and private rooms, five minutes on foot from the Porta Nigra.

⭐ 8.4/10 · 1980 reviews From 32 €
★★★★

Trier-Nord

Moselpark Trier

Large 4-star hotel on the Moselle riverbank. Pool, spa, conference rooms, family rooms.

⭐ 8.3/10 · 1620 reviews From 99 €
★★★★

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Hotel Deutscher Hof

Long-established address on the southern edge of the old town. Solid 4-star comfort, restaurant, bar.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 1340 reviews From 95 €
★★★★
Guest favourite

Kürenz

Hotel Petrisberg

Family-run 4-star hotel with Trier's best views. High up, quiet, and wine-friendly.

⭐ 9.1/10 · 890 reviews From 99 €
★★★★

Euren

Hotel Eurener Hof

Venerable inn in Euren (a district of Trier). Wellness, restaurant, family-friendly.

⭐ 8.8/10 · 920 reviews From 105 €
★★★

Trier-Nord

Hotel Casa Chiara

Small B&B-style hotel on the Moselle riverbank. Personal, fair, with a fresh breakfast.

⭐ 8.5/10 · 720 reviews From 79 €
★★★★
Guest favourite

Olewig

Weinhaus Becker

Boutique wine house with the Michelin-starred Becker's restaurant in Olewig (a wine village within Trier). Cuisine and wine at the highest level.

⭐ 9.2/10 · 480 reviews From 145 €
★★★

Olewig

Hotel-Weinhaus Haag

Family-run wine house in the heart of Olewig. House wines, a traditional tavern room, and short walks home.

⭐ 8.8/10 · 540 reviews From 89 €

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.

Cookies & tracking

We use cookies and third-party services (Stay22 for hotel prices, GetYourGuide for tours, Google Analytics, Google AdSense) to load content, analyse usage and show relevant offers. Choose what you want to allow. Details in our privacy policy. privacy policy.
